use_cases: Company about pages showcasing product ecosystems and mission statements
Landing page hero sections with statistics and CTAs for tech companies
Product introduction pages with gradient imagery and company achievements
SaaS landing pages featuring ecosystem narratives and feature highlights
ai_summary: A full-featured about page component with a gradient hero image, company statistics showcase, descriptive text sections, and call-to-action buttons. Built with Framer Motion for potential animations, responsive grid layouts, and dark/light mode support. Includes configurable achievement counters and nested Button/Link components for navigation.
